name: omomomo
tagline: Easter-egg skill that prints a fixed promotional blurb about the unrelated 'oh-my-opencode' CLI tool.
verdict: Safe to install: the skill contains no code, no shell/network calls, no credential access, and no hidden instructions - it only outputs a static marketing message about a separate GitHub project when triggered by 'omomomo'/'about'/'easter egg'. highlights.summary: No explicit 'do NOT use when' guidance is given, though ambiguity risk is low given the narrow, distinctive trigger words.
No version field or changelog signal anywhere in the frontmatter or body.
